title: Shaan Puri
html:
Stub. Entrepreneur and writer whose "strategically broke" essay (mailbag/strategically-broke) has been a load-bearing reference for Yahir's Austin-move thesis since November 2024. Re-cited in 2025 08 13 plan for austin and 2025 10 03 im moving to austin. Frame: deliberately stay broke + mobile + optimistic for as long as possible while building. One of Yahir's mentors-from-afar.

First mentioned in 2024 11 28 future plan; promoted on 3rd cross-summary mention.
